SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 Profile

java.lang.Object
com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
public class Profile extends Object
Model class representing a user profile in the SyntaxEvents application.

Stores personal information, role assignments, device identification, and notification preferences for a registered user. This class is used as a Firestore data model and is serialized/deserialized directly via DocumentSnapshot.toObject(Profile.class).

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Profile()
    Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.
    Profile(String name, String email, String phone, boolean isEntrant, boolean isOrganizer, boolean isAdmin, boolean organizerNotificationsEnabled, boolean adminNotificationEnabled, String deviceId)
    Constructs a fully initialized Profile.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Profile

      public Profile()
      Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    • Profile

      public Profile(String name, String email, String phone, boolean isEntrant, boolean isOrganizer, boolean isAdmin, boolean organizerNotificationsEnabled, boolean adminNotificationEnabled, String deviceId)
      Constructs a fully initialized Profile.
      参数:
      name - the full name of the user
      email - the email address of the user
      phone - the phone number of the user, or null if not provided
      isEntrant - true if the user has the entrant role
      isOrganizer - true if the user has the organizer role
      isAdmin - true if the user has admin privileges; always false on registration
      organizerNotificationsEnabled - true if the user has notifications from organizersenabled
      adminNotificationEnabled - true if the usaer has notifications from admins enabled
      deviceId - the unique device identifier for the user

  • 方法详细资料

    • isEntrant

      public boolean isEntrant()
      Returns whether the user has the entrant role.
      返回:
      true if the user is an entrant

    • setEntrant

      public void setEntrant(boolean entrant)
      Sets the entrant role flag for the user.
      参数:
      entrant - true to assign the entrant role

    • isOrganizer

      public boolean isOrganizer()
      Returns whether the user has the organizer role.
      返回:
      true if the user is an organizer

    • setOrganizer

      public void setOrganizer(boolean organizer)
      Sets the organizer role flag for the user.
      参数:
      organizer - true to assign the organizer role

    • isAdmin

      public boolean isAdmin()
      Returns whether the user has admin privileges.
      返回:
      true if the user is an admin

    • setAdmin

      public void setAdmin(boolean admin)
      Sets the admin privilege flag for the user.
      参数:
      admin - true to grant admin privileges

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the full name of the user.
      返回:
      the user's name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the full name of the user.
      参数:
      name - the new name to assign

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Returns the email address of the user.
      返回:
      the user's email

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Sets the email address of the user.
      参数:
      email - the new email to assign

    • getPhone

      public String getPhone()
      Returns the phone number of the user.
      返回:
      the user's phone number, or null if not provided

    • setPhone

      public void setPhone(String phone)
      Sets the phone number of the user.
      参数:
      phone - the new phone number to assign, or null to clear it

    • isNotificationsEnabled

      public boolean isNotificationsEnabled()
      Returns whether the user has notifications enabled.
      返回:
      true if notifications are enabled

    • setNotificationsEnabled

      public void setNotificationsEnabled(boolean notificationsEnabled)
      Sets the notification preference for the user.
      参数:
      notificationsEnabled - true to enable notifications

    • getDeviceId

      public String getDeviceId()
      Returns the unique device identifier associated with the user.
      返回:
      the device ID string

    • setDeviceId

      public void setDeviceId(String deviceId)
      Sets the unique device identifier for the user.
      参数:
      deviceId - the device ID to assign

    • setNotificationsOptedOut

      public void setNotificationsOptedOut(boolean notificationsOptedOut)
      Checks if user has notifications on

    • isOrganizerNotificationEnabled

      public boolean isOrganizerNotificationEnabled()
      Return whether a entrant allow organizer send notification
      返回:
      true if a entrant allow organizer send notification

    • setOrganizerNotificationEnabled

      public void setOrganizerNotificationEnabled(boolean organizerNotificationEnabled)
      Set the enable of organizer notification
      参数:
      organizerNotificationEnabled - true or false of organizer notification enable

    • isAdminNotificationEnabled

      public boolean isAdminNotificationEnabled()
      Return whether a entrant allow admin send notification
      返回:
      true if a entrant allow admin send notification

    • setAdminNotificationEnabled

      public void setAdminNotificationEnabled(boolean adminNotificationEnabled)
      Set the enable of admin notification
      参数:
      adminNotificationEnabled - true or false of admin notification enable
